title: Alpha
description: Prepare an internally usable alpha with clear architecture boundaries, diagnosable failure modes, and a closed core workflow.
phaseTargets: document failure diagnosis and operator commands
architectureCriteria: runtime, adapters, and product data paths are separated
failure modes have owners and repair actions
runtimeCriteria: core workflow reaches terminal success in a controlled environment
configuration does not require editing source code
releaseCriteria: alpha users can reproduce the workflow
remaining mock or demo-only paths are disclosed
final decision is GO, CONDITIONAL-GO, NO-GO, or BLOCKED
